name: Taglarini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onions.
2. Stir in tomatoes, chili powder, corn, olives, and margarine. Cook for 10 minutes.
3. Beat eggs, milk, and cornmeal together.
4. Stir the egg mixture into the meat mixture.
5. Pour the casserole into a dish.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 40 minutes.
